case_title: PEI YUE HE VS. ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE AND COLLISION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-24-2008 AT 3:30PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR SAN FRANCISCO
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE NOT PRESENT (NO PROOF OF SERVICE). DEFENDANT YING HO IS PRESENT,AND WAIVES SERVICE. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HE, PEI YUE AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR SAN FRANCISCO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HE, PEI YUE AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR SAN FRANCISCO BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE AND COLLISION HO, YING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HE, PEI YUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR SAN FRANCISCO HO, YING DEFENDANT BARANCE AUTOMOTIVE AND COLLISION DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
